CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Deal_Interest__c ) = 'No interest in leasing',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Interest__c ) = 'New Customer that has not explicitly addressed leasing',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Interest__c ) = 'Customer has requested information of leasing vs financing',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Interest__c ) = 'Exisiting Customer has requested a lease quote',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Deal_Interest
